friendly_name: 3.2.0a5 Tranche 1: Release Reset & CLI Surface Cleanup
purpose_context: This stabilization tranche resets the 3.2.0a5 release train and clears nine release-hygiene issues. It removes the deprecated /spec-kitty.checklist command from generated user-facing surfaces, restores strict mypy on mission-step contracts, fixes the dev-worktree upgrade version mismatch, suppresses misleading post-success sync and token-refresh error noise, hides legacy --feature aliases from help while keeping them functional, sharpens the init message when the target is not a git repository, and clarifies the spec-kitty agent decision command shape, so the next prerelease behaves predictably for local agents and contributors.
purpose_tldr: Stabilize the 3.2.0a5 release train and trim confusing CLI surfaces; no new product features.
source_description: Stabilization tranche prepared in start-here.md (workspace root) covering GitHub issues #805, #705, #815, #635, #636, #790, #774, #735, #717. Bulk-edit mode is set because issue #815 removes the /spec-kitty.checklist command across ~30 template/registry/snapshot/doc files; an occurrence map is to be drafted during /spec-kitty.plan. Other issues are localized fixes.
